data.task:
Fix ticket 0072 (Launch Error) per the FOUNDER-APPROVED diagnosis in the run prompt. This is a PRESENTATION-ONLY fix in packages/ui. The runnerless-handoff routing is CORRECT and must NOT be touched — do not change the daemon launcher, the 409/independent-of-runner guard, or the /runs/independent-handoff routing. The bug: a SUCCESSFUL runnerless handoff is painted as a launch failure.

Make these four changes:

1. packages/ui/src/renderer/LaunchProgressModal.tsx (and the LaunchProgressState type wherever it is declared): add a DISTINCT non-error terminal state (e.g. a `notice`/`handoff` variant) that carries BOTH `handoffPath` AND the copy-paste `command`. Do NOT overload the existing `error` field for this. `hasError` must stay false for this new state.

2. LaunchProgressModal rendering: render the new state with a neutral/success icon (NOT the warning-circle), and an actionable message of the form: "Runnerless handoff created — run it in a fresh terminal: <command>". It must NOT say "Launch needs attention." and must NOT use the red alert box. Surface the `command` so it is copy-pasteable, not only the handoff file path.

3. packages/ui/src/renderer/App.tsx, doLaunch() (~line 588): on a successful handoff (res.ok === true && priority.independentOfRunner) route through the NEW notice/handoff channel instead of calling setLaunchProgressError(...). Confirm doLaunchTicket is unaffected (handoff applies to priorities only, not tickets) — leave its behavior unchanged.

4. packages/ui/tests/live-app.test.tsx: update the handoff assertions (~lines 444–476) to expect the SUCCESS presentation (the new notice state, neutral icon, command shown), and ADD a regression test asserting the handoff outcome does NOT render the error / "needs attention" / red-alert affordance.

Acceptance criteria: the packages/ui test suite passes — run it and report the exact command + exit code. Specifically live-app.test.tsx, the LaunchProgressModal tests, and the dashboard tests must be green. Scope: packages/ui ONLY. Do not modify any daemon, launcher, or routing code. Report the full diff and the test command output (exit code, pass counts) as evidence.

data.reason: Presentation-only fix in packages/ui only: handoff success now renders neutral check-circle + copy-paste command (no error treatment), routing/daemon untouched, daemon confirmed to return command; full ui suite 175/175 + tsc clean.

data.resolution: Fixed in packages/ui: successful runnerless handoff now renders a distinct non-error notice state (LaunchProgressState.handoff) with a neutral check-circle icon and the copy-paste `cocoder run-independent` command, instead of the false 'Launch needs attention.' error. App.tsx doLaunch routes handoff success through the new channel; daemon launchIndependentHandoff already returns the command. Routing/independent-of-runner guard untouched. Regression test added; packages/ui suite 175/175 green, tsc clean.

data.waitCondition: wrap-up prepared; final delivery pending landing outcome
